gaps: No YAML frontmatter (missing scope, sources, targets metadata for registry)
Coverage table data appears to be from 2026-02-27 -- may be stale
References Compose Multiplatform 1.10.0 vs versions-manifest compose-multiplatform 1.7.x (manifest may need updating or doc references compose-gradle-plugin)
Wave 1 parallel tracks section may be outdated if tracks have been merged
No explicit L0/L1 delegation references (Phase 15 will add @import directives)
Module structure section duplicates README content -- consolidation opportunity
Missing shared-kmp-libs module version info (which modules and versions consumed)
claude_md_assessment.phase_15_notes: DawSync CLAUDE.md is the largest (232 lines, exceeds 150-line target). Phase 15 rewrite should: (1) add frontmatter, (2) extract wave/track info to separate doc, (3) add L0/L1 delegation via @import, (4) consolidate module structure with README, (5) add skills/commands reference. Target: <150 lines with delegation.

consolidation_recommendations: docs/archive/ has 12 superseded files ready for cleanup and 21 files with unique content to preserve
47 files identified as L0 promotion candidates (generic patterns applicable to any KMP project)
38 active docs overlap with AndroidCommonDoc L0 patterns -- review for consolidation
3 L2>L1 override candidates identified where DawSync patterns should take precedence
.agents/skills/ contains 8 web-quality skills that are fully generic -- strong L0 promotion candidates
CLAUDE.md exceeds 150-line context budget (232 lines) -- needs restructuring in Phase 15
6 .claude/agents could be templated as generic L0 agent patterns with parameterization
32 .claude/commands are generic enough for L0 templating
docs/guides/TESTING.md contains DawSync-specific overrides that should be flagged as L2>L1 for testing-patterns
Version discrepancy: DawSync CLAUDE.md references Kotlin 2.3.10, but TECHNOLOGY_CHEATSHEET says 2.3.0 -- internal inconsistency to resolve

files.notes: Compact and actionable. Missing YAML frontmatter. Covers module catalog, build commands, critical rules. Does not cover all 52 modules (lists categories but omits Domain-specific, Firebase, Others). Missing L0 cross-references. Phase 15 rewrite candidate.
Comprehensive but long (316 lines). Module details section is redundant with individual READMEs. Coverage data may drift from coverage-full-report.md. No YAML frontmatter.
Generated coverage report (1249 lines). Too long for token-efficient agent consumption. Should be auto-generated, not manually maintained. Data may be stale (generated 2026-03-13).

Well-structured with checklists, examples, and tables. Contains shared-kmp-libs-specific patterns (module exception hierarchy, ExceptionMapper). Too long at 341 lines. Written in Spanish. NOT an L0 candidate -- tightly coupled to shared-kmp-libs module structure (ExceptionMapper, CompositeExceptionMapper, DomainException). L0 error-handling-patterns.md covers generic patterns already.

Coverage strategy specific to shared-kmp-libs modules. References Kover 0.9.4 which conflicts with versions-manifest.json (0.9.1) -- manifest likely stale. Very long at 694 lines. NOT an L0 candidate -- contains per-module coverage data specific to shared-kmp-libs. Generic testing patterns already in L0 testing-patterns.md.

Explains api() vs implementation() for transitive deps. Written in mixed English/Spanish. Could partially promote to L0 (the api()/implementation() rule is generic Gradle) but the specific module examples are L1. Too long at 320 lines.

Detailed convention plugin documentation. Very long at 501 lines. Specific to shared-kmp-libs build-logic. NOT an L0 candidate -- references specific plugin IDs (com.grinx.shared.kmp.library) and project structure. L0 gradle-patterns.md covers generic convention plugin patterns.

Complete Gradle setup guide with composite build, settings.gradle.kts examples. Very long at 647 lines. Contains version catalog sharing pattern that could be L0. Specific DawSync/WakeTheCave examples are L1. NOT an L0 candidate overall -- too tied to project-specific paths and module names.
Agent for guarding API module contracts. Compact at 22 lines. Has YAML frontmatter. Could be partially L0 (generic API/impl separation pattern) but references shared-kmp-libs flat naming convention.

Error_Mappers.description: All 9 error mapper modules follow the identical ExceptionMapper pattern from core-error. A single group-level template can document the pattern, with per-module entries listing the source exception class and mapping rules.

Storage.description: The 10 storage modules share core-storage-api interfaces. Documentation should explain which implementation backs which use case, with a decision tree for choosing the right storage variant.

l0_promotion_candidates.rationale: The api() vs implementation() rule is a generic Gradle/KMP pattern applicable to any multi-module project. However, the doc contains too many shared-kmp-libs specific examples (module names, DawSync integration). PARTIAL candidate: extract the generic rule into L0 gradle-patterns.md, keep specific examples in L1.

l0_promotion_rejected.rationale: Tightly coupled to shared-kmp-libs module structure (ExceptionMapper, CompositeExceptionMapper, DomainException, core-error-* mapper modules). L0 already has error-handling-patterns.md covering generic Result<T> and CancellationException patterns.
Contains per-module coverage data specific to shared-kmp-libs (19/28 modules at 100%, core-logging 99.1%, etc.). L0 already has testing-patterns.md and sub-docs covering generic KMP testing patterns.
References specific plugin IDs (com.grinx.shared.kmp.library, com.grinx.shared.kmp.compose) and internal project structure. L0 gradle-patterns.md covers convention plugin concepts generically.
Contains project-specific paths, module names, and composite build examples with DawSync/WakeTheCave. L0 gradle-patterns.md covers composite builds generically.

strengths: Compact and token-efficient (57 lines, well under 150-line target)
Clear module catalog organized by category
Actionable content: build commands, critical rules, how-to-add-module checklist
Proper table formatting for AI consumption
gaps: Missing YAML frontmatter -- no scope/sources/targets metadata for registry/vault integration

Module catalog incomplete: lists Foundation, I/O & Network, Storage, Security & Auth, Error Mappers -- but omits Domain-specific (billing, subscription, gdpr, audit, backend, firebase) and Others (system, version, designsystem-foundation)
No L0 cross-references -- should reference AndroidCommonDoc patterns that agents should load for generic KMP rules (testing-patterns, error-handling-patterns, kmp-architecture)
No mention of .claude/agents or .claude/commands tooling available to agents
Test coverage section (100% for foundation + API modules) does not match current reality (core-logging at 99.1%, core-network-api at 98.9%)
No OAuth, Firebase, GDPR, Billing, or Subscription module documentation references
Missing: version catalog location, platform support matrix, Compose Multiplatform version
claude_md_assessment.phase_15_notes: CLAUDE.md rewrite should: (1) add YAML frontmatter with scope/layer metadata, (2) complete module catalog covering all 52 modules, (3) add L0 @import references for generic patterns (testing, error handling, KMP architecture), (4) add .claude/agents and .claude/commands inventory, (5) fix coverage claims to match actual state, (6) add version catalog reference (libs.versions.toml), (7) keep under 150 lines -- use category grouping with doc_plan links for full documentation, (8) add context delegation: 'For generic KMP patterns, see AndroidCommonDoc L0 patterns'

files.notes: Hub doc linking to 3 sub-docs (configuration, usage, troubleshooting). Well-structured with core principles and sub-document index. 95 lines -- compact and effective.
276 lines -- approaches section size limit. Covers generateResClass, multi-module setup, critical path rules.
204 lines. Anti-patterns, common issues, and fixes with root cause analysis. Actionable troubleshooting guide.
208 lines. Covers string resources, image loading, font loading, dual resource system, UiText pattern. Comprehensive.

hub_doc_structure.description: 3 topic groups use hub+sub-doc pattern: testing-patterns (3 sub-docs), viewmodel-state-patterns (3 sub-docs), offline-first-patterns (3 sub-docs), compose-resources-patterns (3 sub-docs). Total: 4 hubs, 12 sub-docs. Remaining 7 docs are standalone.
standalone_docs: resource-management-patterns.md (462 lines -- should become hub or split)
ui-screen-patterns.md (651 lines -- urgently needs hub+sub-doc split)

coverage_gap_candidates.evidence: CLAUDE.md references Navigation3 with @Serializable routes as primary navigation. WakeTheCave has extensive navigation docs. viewmodel-navigation.md is only 89 lines and missing Navigation3 specifics.
CLAUDE.md mandates Koin with koinViewModel(), module declarations in di/ package. No dedicated L0 doc covers DI patterns, module organization, or testing with Koin.
shared-kmp-libs has 7 security/auth modules (encryption, security-keys, auth-biometric, oauth-*). No L0 pattern doc covers security architecture, key storage best practices, or biometric patterns.

CLAUDE.md defines Repository impls and DataSources in Data layer. DawSync has extensive repository patterns. No dedicated L0 doc beyond offline-first (which is a specific variant). Missing: general repository pattern, data mapping, DAO patterns.

Composite build setup, dependencySubstitution, version catalog sharing are key patterns used by DawSync and WakeTheCave. gradle-patterns.md covers this but from the library perspective, not the consumer perspective.
shared-kmp-libs has firebase-api, firebase-rest, firebase-native modules plus backend-api. No L0 doc covers KMP Firebase integration patterns or backend API design.
shared-kmp-libs has billing-api and subscription modules with 28 kt files total. No L0 doc covers in-app purchase patterns or subscription state management.
